description: A cleanroom technician must monitor and maintain the environment where a satellite is being assembled to prevent contamination.

nodes.task_description: Monitor the cleanroom's particle counters, temperature, and humidity levels to ensure they remain within the specified limits (e.g., ISO 8).

expected_outcome.expected: Agent observes all environmental parameters are nominal.

nodes.task_description: Perform regular wipe-downs of surfaces with approved cleaning solutions.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent follows the standard cleaning procedure.

nodes.task_description: Log all environmental data and cleaning activities in the cleanroom logbook.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent maintains a complete and accurate log.
